overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks along sidewalks, crosses streets, and passes under elevated highways and overpasses in a dense urban environment with heavy holographic advertising and cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with commercial signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath elevated structures, passing illuminated commercial signs

entered.detail: illuminated commercial sign with white lettering on dark background
tropical tree in large concrete planter with green fronds
elevated walkway connecting buildings with glass sides
large vertical digital advertisement with red and white graphics
tall building with illuminated windows and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing the illuminated MOONCHIES sign and palm tree planters. The environment features dense neon signage and holographic advertisements on surrounding futuristic skyscrapers.

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto open street with yellow crosswalk markings
crossing the street along wide yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at a marked crosswalk while navigating through sparse pedestrian traffic

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow parallel lines
large suspended digital advertisement screen showing animated content
sleek dark-colored car parked along the street curb
massive concrete and steel overpass with red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway onto a wide street intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk markings. The camera crosses the street beneath massive overhead digital billboards and elevated highway structures with red accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street under elevated highway with discount stores

events.description: enters covered area beneath red structural beams of elevated highway
passes close to wall with large green graffiti art temporarily filling right side of frame

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway structure past discount stores and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with headlights on driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated store sign with red background and white text
exposed steel support beams painted red supporting the overhead highway
wall covered in colorful street art including green and blue designs
vertical strips of purple neon lighting along building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the red structural beams of an elevated highway, passing the ZETTO DISCOUNT store and walls covered in glowing graffiti art. The environment is darker and more enclosed with purple neon lighting accents and moving traffic visible on the left.

events.description: exits covered underpass into more open commercial area with large vertical billboards
slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts and large vertical advertisements, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking toward camera direction

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertisement with text and graphics on building side
building facade covered with multiple stacked digital screens and neon signs
commercial entrance with bright neon lighting and glass doors

segments.scene_description: Continuing along a bustling commercial sidewalk with large vertical billboards and multi-story building advertisements. The area features various storefronts with bright neon signage and moderate pedestrian traffic moving in both directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, moving from a sheltered walkway into a wide intersection and finally through a dense commercial district. It begins along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing an illuminated Moonchies sign and palm tree planters amidst a backdrop of towering holographic advertisements. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens onto a wide street intersection with bright yellow crosswalks and massive overhead digital billboards framed by red accent lighting. The perspective then shifts into a darker, more enclosed area beneath red structural beams, passing the Zetto Discount store and walls of glowing graffiti while purple neon accents light the path. Finally, the environment expands once more into a bustling commercial corridor filled with multi-story vertical billboards and bright storefronts as the camera moves past a steady flow of pedestrian traffic.
